narrative:
New Franklin City has 9,791 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
